basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Winota as a RW combat triggers/Humans Commander anchor.
Public Commander and cEDH sources label Winota as a Commander/cEDH aggro-stax deck commander.
Aggro-stax should remain bracket-aware and not overwrite casual combat expectations.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Expected packages separate non-Human enablers from Human hits.
Hard stax density should follow user bracket/power intent.

themes.name: combat_triggers_humans
themes.notes: Winota converts non-Human attacks into Human hits from the library.

themes.name: nonhuman_enabler_density
themes.notes: Cheap non-Humans and token makers are mandatory to trigger Winota.

themes.name: boros_aggro_stax
themes.notes: Hatebears and rule pieces help attacks matter in high-power tables.

examples: Human typal pile with no trigger enablers
avoid_patterns.reason: Winota requires non-Humans attacking to trigger.

examples: too many high-cost Humans without backup plan
avoid_patterns.reason: Hands must still function when Winota is removed.
Green and black stax cards are outside RW identity.
